home.seoDescription: Explore recent photography, writing, projects, and exhibitions from Houston-based web developer, creative strategist, and photographer Raul Martinez.

writing.seoDescription: Read blog posts, dev notes, lists, and other writing from Houston-based web developer and photographer Raul Martinez.
writing.emptyState: Add your first entry in src/content/blog and it will appear here.

filters.sortOldestAriaLabel: Sort blog posts by oldest first

photography.seoDescription: View photography albums and visual studies by Raul Martinez, focused on candid gestures, architecture, light, texture, and motion.
photography.emptyState: Add your first album entry in src/content/photos and it will appear here.

about.seoDescription: Learn about Raul Martinez, his creative practice, selected projects, exhibitions, and current work.
about.summaryEmptyState: Add an about summary in Pages CMS when you're ready.

contact.seoDescription: Contact Raul Martinez about web development, creative strategy, photography, projects, or collaborations.
